Vitality_1.TutorialText_11_F5F98E9C47DA80DC659CA998:
NSLOCTEXT("", "C083DBE945BEE5E020E1BFA0659E7C3B", "Maeve will become hungry and thirsty over time, and gain positive or negative <Important>Status Effects</> depending on the status of her <Important>Vitality</>, comprised of <Energy>Energy</>, <Nutrition>Nutrition</> and <Thirst>Thirst</>.

These stats are represented at the bottom left of the screen. Hover over the icons to view more information about each stat.

You can find or craft <Important>Consumable</> items which will affect Maeve's <Important>Vitality</> in different ways - experiment with them to find your favourite.

You can view <Important>Status Effects</> affecting Maeve as icons near the bottom of the screen. 
Hover over one to view more info about it.


Press <Important>Next</> to learn how to interact with the world.")

Vitality_2.TutorialText_11_F5F98E9C47DA80DC659CA998: NSLOCTEXT("", "66066A75439744414992A88ED40EDB48", "Many objects in the world, like the nearby cacti, can be interacted with. You can activate the Scan ability of Maeve's suit with (X) to highlight interactable objects and resources within the environment. Use the mouse to move the cursor over these objects and use (LMB) to interact. Interact with the nearby cacti to try and find some Cactus Fruit to eat in order to improve Maeve's Vitality.")
